news.title: Moody's cuts rating on private credit fund run by KKR and Future Standard to junk as bad loans grow
news.title_cn: 由於不良貸款增加，穆迪將 KKR 和未來標準營運的私人信貸基金評級下調至垃圾級

news.title: Oil rises, with Brent climbing back above $100 as optimism fades over Iran war de-escalation
news.title_cn: 伊朗戰爭緩和的樂觀情緒消退，油價上漲，布蘭特原油價格重回100美元上方

news.title: United ditches more economy seats to make room for bigger premium cabins with new layouts
news.title_cn: 美聯航放棄更多經濟艙座位，為採用新佈局的更大高級客艙騰出空間

news.title: Dow and S&P 500 are little changed as Wall Street tries to build on Monday's rally: Live updates
news.title_cn: 華爾街試圖延續週一的漲勢，道瓊斯指數和標準普爾 500 指數幾乎沒有變化：即時更新

news.title: Home flippers see smallest profits since the Great Recession, real estate data firm says
news.title_cn: 房地產數據公司稱，自大衰退以來，炒房者的利潤最小

news.title: These stocks are cheaper than they were during the pandemic. Evercore ISI says buy them
news.title_cn: 這些股票比大流行期間便宜。 Evercore ISI 表示購買它們

news.title: Global oil prices trade above $103 a barrel after reports that Saudi Arabia and U.A.E. are weighing joining war against Iran
news.title_cn: 有報導稱，沙烏地阿拉伯和阿聯酋的石油價格已突破每桶 103 美元。正在考慮加入對伊朗的戰爭

news.title: Long airport lines may soon disappear as senators sound hopeful on funding deal
news.title_cn: 由於參議員對融資協議充滿希望，機場長隊可能很快就會消失
